projectDescription: A Windows desktop application that lets gamers download, manage, and swap DLSS, FSR, and XeSS DLL versions in PC games without requiring a game update.
keyFeatures: Download and manage DLSS, FSR 3.1, and XeSS DLL versions from a curated manifest
Swap DLL versions in games from Steam, GOG, Epic Games, Ubisoft Connect, Xbox App, Battle.net, and EA App
Automatic backup and restore of original game DLLs before swapping
Import custom/local DLL files into the managed library
Filter and group games by library or favourites with live UI updates
Portable mode and installed mode with configurable storage paths
SQLite-backed game cache for fast startup and persistent game metadata
Per-game notes, favourites, and last-used DLL version tracking
publicApiSurface: GameLibrary enum (Steam, GOG, EpicGamesStore, UbisoftConnect, XboxApp, BattleNet, EAApp, ManuallyAdded)
GameAssetType enum (DLSS, DLSS_G, DLSS_D, FSR_31_DX12, FSR_31_VK, XeSS, XeSS_FG, XeSS_DX11, XeLL and BACKUP variants)
IGameLibrary interface (ListGamesAsync, LoadGamesFromCacheAsync, IsInstalled, IsEnabled, Enable, Disable)
Settings.Instance (HideNonDLSSGames, GroupGameLibrariesTogether, AppTheme, AllowUntrusted, GameLibrarySettings, Language, IgnoredPaths)
